summary: Iteration 35: All 6 Critical Operational Fixes VERIFIED. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All fixes working in UI.

fix_1_bar_orders_save.description: submitOrder() in PulseBarPage.js loops through cart items and calls POST /api/tap/session/{id}/add for each
fix_1_bar_orders_save.evidence: Toast 'X item(s) saved to tab' appears, Maria Santos total increased from $44 to $57 after adding $13 Caipirinha

fix_2_guest_spend_total.description: Guest spend_total updates in MongoDB on tab close via close_tab route (lines 497-502 in tap.py)
fix_2_guest_spend_total.evidence: Backend test verified API updates MongoDB guest spend_total on close

fix_3_inside_tabs_list.description: Inside Tabs section shows all active sessions with click-to-select in PulseBarPage
fix_3_inside_tabs_list.evidence: Bar page shows 5 tabs: Maria Santos #201, Ricardo Almeida #305, Fernando VIP #701, Sofia Cardoso #106, Lucas Oliveira #107

fix_4_chips_payment.description: Chips button added in Bar (pay-chips-btn), closes tab with payment_method=chips
fix_4_chips_payment.evidence: Chips button visible in UI, backend API accepts chips method and stores in tap_payments table

fix_5_manager_chips_separation.description: Manager dashboard shows chips_today ($110) separate from revenue_today ($43)
fix_5_manager_chips_separation.evidence: Manager Overview shows separate KPI cards: Revenue Today $43, Chips Today $110 (amber color)

fix_6_session_detail.description: Session detail shows items list with qty/prices and tip info (tip_amount, tip_percent, tip_recorded)
fix_6_session_detail.evidence: TAP page Fernando VIP #701 shows full items list with quantities, backend returns tip fields

kpis_verified.guest_funnel: 7 entries → 7 allowed → 8 tabs opened → 3 tabs closed

seed_data_creation: TEST_ChipsGuest created during chips payment method test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35: All 6 critical operational fixes working. Bar page flow: select bartender → click Inside Tab → confirm modal → add items → Confirm saves to backend. Chips payment works and shows separate from revenue in Manager. Current state: 5 open tabs (Ricardo $127, Fernando VIP $352, Sofia $42, Lucas $47, Maria $57), 3 closed tabs. Manager Revenue $43 excludes chips, Chips $110 separate.
